entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable device used as data source for health metrics (resting HR, weight, intraday activity)

entities.name: workout_tracker
entities.context: Python module providing upsert functions for daily metrics and weight data into a database

entities.name: Fitbit Sync Script
entities.context: Python script that syncs resting heart rate, weight logs, and intraday activity data from Fitbit API to local database

entities.name: Resting Heart Rate
entities.context: Health metric synced from Fitbit, stored per-day with optional SpO2, skin temp delta, and stress score fields

entities.name: Weight Tracking
entities.context: Body composition data (weight_kg, BMI, fat_pct) synced from Fitbit weight logs

entities.name: Intraday Activity
entities.context: Fine-grained activity timeseries data fetched per-resource per-date from Fitbit API

entities.name: DuckDB
entities.context: Implied local database backend receiving upserted health data via conn parameter

relationships.context: Calls Fitbit REST API endpoints (WEIGHT_DATE_RANGE_URL, INTRADAY_ACTIVITY_URL) with OAuth token
Calls workout_tracker.upsert_daily_metric and upsert_daily_weight to persist synced data
Writes health metrics to database via conn parameter
HR data sourced from Fitbit API, tagged with source='fitbit'
Weight/BMI/fat data sourced from Fitbit weight endpoint
Granular activity timeseries fetched from Fitbit intraday API
